nodes.text:
Progressive tenesmus with new onset rectal bleeding; fatigue over 3 weeks. Additional symptoms include early satiety. Past medical history significant for previous prostate cancer.

Imaging:
CT colonography on 27/03/2024: large polypoid lesion in descending colon. T2 (at most), N1 M0
